untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern detection (head-and-shoulders with right shoulder identification at point E) and zigzag filter threshold logic that cannot be expressed with standard OHLCV indicators. The core requirement is to validate penetration distance against a filter ratio, but no zigzag indicator or pattern-recognition capability exists in the allowed indicator set. Neckline and shoulder detection are chartist pattern features not available in quantitative indicator library.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using pivot point as neckline proxy and ATR ratio as penetration filter substitute, but this is fundamentally inadequate. The signal requires sophisticated pattern recognition beyond available indicators. A proper implementation would need custom pattern detection logic external to this rule engine.
